title: Add Overtli Studio Suite to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Getting Comfy in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Overtli Studio Suite just landed in the community showcase! It brings a sweet collection of ComfyUI nodes for seamless local and cloud AI generation, powered by our API.
gist.summary: Added Overtli Studio Suite, a collection of ComfyUI nodes for unified local and cloud AI generation, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: ComfyUI users can now easily integrate Pollinations.ai into their workflows using Overtli's specialized media nodes and advanced router.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a ComfyUI node suite. Visuals should focus on 'nodes' (boxes connected by wires) and 'comfy' (cozy, relaxing). The bee mascot connecting glowing nodes in a greenhouse setting fits perfectly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot in a warm greenhouse, happily connecting glowing lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender nodes with tiny wires. A chunky retro monitor displays a node-based interface. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
